title: prunus × lannesiana f. arasiyama
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. arasiyama, also known as the Japanese flowering cherry or Yoshino cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. arasiyama include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures.
